testcase.name: codex-generation
testcase.system-out: warning: Could not parse standard attack damage expression.

testcase.name: codex-judged-by-claude
testcase.system-out: Perfect tier and role match for the request Excellent thematic fit for disciplined militia faction All stats within safe bands for tier 1 leader Features strongly reinforce leader battlefield role Formation-focused abilities match militia discipline theme Clear tactical identity and battlefield job

testcase.name: claude-judged-by-codex

failure.message: The militia captain concept hits the tier‑1 leader brief, but the signature abilities are tuned far beyond the safe band for this tier, making the stat block unreliable to run as-written.

testcase.failure: The militia captain concept hits the tier‑1 leader brief, but the signature abilities are tuned far beyond the safe band for this tier, making the stat block unreliable to run as-written. `Rally the Line` lets the captain negate all HP damage and grant an advantaged attack for just 1 Stress, which is an outsized reaction at tier 1 `Coordinated Strike` grants every ally within Very Far an extra attack once per scene, effectively doubling the encounter’s offense and breaking tier-1 balance expectations
testcase.system-out: Correctly identifies a disciplined tier 1 leader with stats inside the tier-role safe bands Motives and tactics clearly convey how the captain leads militia forces
